text.title: reranking-models Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree for reranking-models application; concludes with rule-id refs or skip.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the query volume per month and is self-hosting acceptable?

branch.conclusion: Pick Cohere or MixedBread API after bench.

example.trace: root → high volume + self-host ok → r2-prefer-local-when-volume-high
example.description: 5M queries/month with on-prem allowed → local cross-encoder amortises far cheaper than API.
